text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Confucius

text: The human capacity for burden is like bamboo — far more flexible than you'd ever believe at first glance.
author: Jodi Picoult

text: Rock bottom became the solid foundation on which I rebuilt my life.
author: J.K. Rowling

text: When everything seems to be going against you, remember that the airplane takes off against the wind, not with it.
author: Henry Ford

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: The oak fought the wind and was broken, the willow bent when it must and survived.
author: Robert Jordan

text: You may have to fight a battle more than once to win it.
author: Margaret Thatcher

text: Adversity introduces a man to himself.
author: Unknown

text: Life doesn't get easier or more forgiving. We get stronger and more resilient.
author: Steve Maraboli

text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Strength grows in the moments when you think you can't go on but you keep going anyway.
author: Unknown

text: I am not what happened to me. I am what I choose to become.
author: Carl Jung

text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

text: The comeback is always stronger than the setback.
author: Unknown

text: Every adversity, every failure, every heartbreak carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Do not judge me by my successes. Judge me by how many times I fell down and got back up again.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Sometimes you don't realize your own strength until you come face to face with your greatest weakness.
author: Susan Gale

text: Resilience is knowing that you are the only one that has the power and the responsibility to pick yourself up.
author: Mary Holloway

text: A good half of the art of living is resilience.
author: Alain de Botton
